hbc82de5agac07g42e5g827ag99ccb84f9ef7: We cannot restore balance to the grove while you continue loitering. Please leave.
hdaa30c9dgbe8cg4b73g9662gc5f31e27ea10: I think it's high time you all left - our sacred grove has sheltered you enough.
h1b103950g3692g42e4g9f62ga044c9a9b9e8: And before the attack - were you 'sheltering', or just plain cowering?
ha053eeecg3e82g44bcg938ag12cc1469bc8c: The dignity of the grove comes first. It cannot be tended to if its custodians are dead.
hbc9be488gbb3dg4cd7g908fg278ecc11422a: Besides, you survived. I'll not apologise for my actions.
h3847cba3g6b10g4c0dga798g6ba864286130: Where were you during the attack?
h3ee9bb1bga71eg4d20g9eb8g47518843c7d8: Within the inner sanctum, of course. It is not for us to fight your battles.
h9e6e9689g8d46g497fg82bag515f0ecfea97: I'll be on my way soon.
h1aafab95gb154g446bga24ag7b26267e49c7: Make it quick. You're disrupting the harmony of this holy place.
hae61ca18gdcf0g4c05gad87g774ecc476327: I assure you - the feeling is mutual.
h113f0541gb722g48dfg9760gcb108087461d: Do not presume to speak for this place - not when you did nothing to defend it.
h3decde95gcea0g4033gbc29g2a32e5081170: I answer to Silvanus and Silvanus only. And you are not the Oak Father.
